title: Budget Analyst
description: Caterpillar seeks a Budget Analyst to support financial planning and cost management across the organization.
responsibilities: Develop budget forecasts and variance analyses for business units
Monitor spending and identify cost-saving opportunities
Prepare budget reports and present findings to management
Support capital budgeting and investment planning processes
Analyze financial trends and business performance metrics
Maintain budget documentation and tracking systems

requirements.education: High school diploma or equivalent; relevant degree or certification strongly preferred

benefits: Flexible time off and work arrangements
